india_trends.title: Crude shock, Iran standoff drag Nifty below 24,000 to three-week low
india_trends.summary: Rising geopolitical tensions, concerns over India’s import bill and pressure on foreign exchange reserves weighed heavily on investor sentiment, even as defensive sectors like Pharma and Healthcare showed resilience.

india_trends.title: Bank of Baroda aims 10 per cent corporate growth in FY27, Rs 50,000 cr loans in pipeline
india_trends.summary: Bank of Baroda plans a 10 percent expansion of its corporate lending by FY27. A Rs 50,000 crore pipeline is in place, with significant demand for investment loans. The bank will focus on external benchmark lending rates to improve margins. Deposit costs remain a challenge, but overall funding is suf

india_trends.title: Lord's Mark Industries Ltd. announces AI-supported Dialysis ecosystem launch
india_trends.summary: Lord's Mark Industries Ltd. has launched an integrated dialysis ecosystem in Ahmedabad, featuring the AI-driven Renalyx Machine. This CE-certified, India-engineered system, coupled with RenalOS and Aureoon, offers a Dialysis-as-a-Service model. It aims to provide accessible, affordable, and advanced

india_trends.title: How should stock and mutual fund investors rebalance their portfolios amid market volatility? Here's a guide
india_trends.summary: Amid increasing geopolitical risks and economic uncertainty, experts advise investors on how to rebalance portfolios effectively. Focusing on quality stocks, maintaining SIPs, and adjusting allocations can help navigate this volatile landscape.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Govt mulls incentives to boost floating solar panel installation
india_trends.summary: India plans incentives for floating solar panels to spread renewable energy across the country. This aims to avoid concentration in a few states. The nation envisions significant renewable energy capacity and battery storage by 2050. Efforts are underway to boost domestic manufacturing of solar comp

india_trends.title: Equity MFs inflow drops 5% to ₹38,440 cr in Apr
india_trends.summary: Overall, the industry recorded a net infusion of ₹3.22 lakh crore in April after witnessing an outflow of ₹2.4 lakh crore in March

india_trends.title: Need to utilise, leverage FTAs: Commerce Secretary Rajesh Agrawal to industry
india_trends.summary: Indian industry must actively use new free trade agreements. These pacts offer significant trade and investment prospects. Commerce Secretary Rajesh Agrawal highlighted the need for better utilization. Modern agreements go beyond tariffs, focusing on services and regulations. This aims to create a p

india_trends.title: Indian state oil refiners eye modest fuel price hike as losses mount
india_trends.summary: Indian state refiners anticipate a small rise in fuel prices soon. This move aims to balance losses from the ongoing Persian Gulf war and consumer needs. Diesel and gasoline prices may increase by about 5 rupees per liter. This adjustment is necessary to offset significant daily losses.

india_trends.title: Britannia stock needs a treat of accelerated growth rates
india_trends.summary: Britannia Industries' stock fell 7% after Q4FY26 delivered a tepid 5.5% volume growth, undercut by rival Parle's lower pricing and war-linked international supply disruptions.&nbsp;

india_trends.title: Ather, JBM Auto, Ola Electric shares surge after PM Modi urges shift away from fuel consumption
india_trends.summary: Market participants interpreted the remarks as a positive signal for the electric mobility ecosystem

india_trends.title: FAITH seeks steps to attract more foreign tourists amid PM Modi's austerity call on international travel
india_trends.summary: Following PM Modi's appeal to curb foreign travel, the tourism industry body FAITH urged equal focus on attracting international tourists to boost foreign exchange. FAITH called for eased visa restrictions, improved connectivity, and enhanced global promotion to leverage India's rich tourism potenti

india_trends.title: JSW Energy Q4 Results: Cons profit rises 38% YoY to Rs 574 crore; revenue jumps 41%
india_trends.summary: JSW Energy announced a significant 38% year-on-year increase in its consolidated net profit for the March-ended quarter, reaching Rs 574 crore. This strong performance was driven by a substantial 41% jump in revenue, which climbed to Rs 4,499 crore in Q4FY26 compared to the previous year's correspon

india_trends.title: India's Afcons emerges as successful bidder to construct railway line in Europe
india_trends.summary: Indian company Afcons Infrastructure Ltd has secured a major railway project in Croatia. This marks Afcons' entry into Europe and is its largest international order to date. The project involves reconstructing an existing track and building a second line. It includes civil works, electrification, an

india_trends.title: SEBI proposes ‘GARUDA’ green-channel for faster AIF scheme launches
india_trends.summary: Under the proposal, regular AIF schemes would be allowed to launch within 10 working days of filing the PPM with SEBI through a merchant banker, unless the regulator raises objections.

india_trends.title: Rupee drops most in a month to record closing as oil runs hot over US-Iran stalemate
india_trends.summary: The Indian rupee experienced its sharpest fall in over a month, reaching a record low against the dollar. Rising crude oil prices, driven by tensions in the Strait of Hormuz, significantly impacted the currency. India's equity markets and government bonds also saw declines.
